# Code Anchors: Prime Server Runtime

- `apps/prime/server.ts` — the single dev/prod server entry: Vite middleware in dev, built bundle in prod, both funneling through the app-owned HTTP server and attaching the stub upgrade handler.
- `apps/prime/server/http-server.ts` — wraps the request listener in a Node HTTP server this app owns, leaving the upgrade event free, and attaches the stub WebSocket upgrade handler.
- `apps/prime/server/http-server.spec.ts` — regression guard: a stub WebSocket handshake completes on the server with zero change to the request-handling path.
- `apps/prime/server/app.ts` — the framework-mode request handler wrapped in an Express app, mounted behind the custom server.
- `apps/prime/app/root.tsx` — the server-rendered HTML document shell for the framework-mode app.
- `apps/prime/react-router.config.ts` — enables server rendering for the framework-mode app.
- `apps/prime/vite.config.ts` — framework-mode build plus the server-render bundle input.
